queries.name: credentialByUser
queries.jpql: select cred from CredentialEntity cred where cred.user = :user order by cred.priority

queries.name: deleteCredentialsByRealm
queries.jpql: delete from CredentialEntity cred where cred.user IN (select u from UserEntity u where u.realmId=:realmId)

queries.name: deleteCredentialsByRealmAndLink
queries.jpql: delete from CredentialEntity cred where cred.user IN (select u from UserEntity u where u.realmId=:realmId and u.federationLink=:link)

queries.name: deleteFederatedIdentityByProvider
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedIdentityEntity fdi where fdi.realmId = :realmId and fdi.identityProvider = :providerAlias

queries.name: deleteFederatedIdentityByRealm
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedIdentityEntity social where social.user IN (select u from UserEntity u where realmId=:realmId)

queries.name: deleteFederatedIdentityByRealmAndLink
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedIdentityEntity social where social.user IN (select u from UserEntity u where realmId=:realmId and u.federationLink=:link)

queries.name: deleteFederatedIdentityByUser
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedIdentityEntity social where social.user = :user

queries.name: findFederatedIdentityByUser
queries.jpql: select link from FederatedIdentityEntity link where link.user = :user

queries.name: findFederatedIdentityByUserAndProvider
queries.jpql: select link from FederatedIdentityEntity link where link.user = :user and link.identityProvider = :identityProvider

queries.name: findUserByFederatedIdentityAndRealm
queries.jpql: select link.user from FederatedIdentityEntity link where link.realmId = :realmId and link.identityProvider = :identityProvider and link.userId = :userId

queries.name: deleteFederatedAttributesByStorageProvider
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserAttributeEntity e where e.storageProviderId=:storageProviderId

queries.name: deleteUserFederatedAttributesByRealm
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserAttributeEntity attr where attr.realmId=:realmId

queries.name: deleteUserFederatedAttributesByRealmAndLink
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserAttributeEntity attr where attr.userId IN (select u.id from UserEntity u where u.realmId=:realmId and u.federationLink=:link)

queries.name: deleteUserFederatedAttributesByUser
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserAttributeEntity attr where attr.userId = :userId and attr.realmId=:realmId

queries.name: deleteUserFederatedAttributesByUserAndName
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserAttributeEntity attr where attr.userId = :userId and attr.name=:name and attr.realmId=:realmId

queries.name: getFederatedAttributesByNameAndLongValue
queries.jpql: select attr.userId, attr.longValue from FederatedUserAttributeEntity attr where attr.name = :name and attr.longValueHash = :longValueHash and attr.realmId=:realmId

queries.name: getFederatedAttributesByNameAndValue
queries.jpql: select attr.userId from FederatedUserAttributeEntity attr where attr.name = :name and attr.value = :value and attr.realmId=:realmId

queries.name: getFederatedAttributesByUser
queries.jpql: select attr from FederatedUserAttributeEntity attr where attr.userId = :userId and attr.realmId=:realmId

queries.name: deleteFederatedUserCredentialByUser
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.userId = :userId and cred.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: deleteFederatedUserCredentialByUserAndType
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.userId = :userId and cred.type = :type

queries.name: deleteFederatedUserCredentialByUserAndTypeAndUserLabel
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.userId = :userId and cred.type = :type and cred.userLabel = :userLabel

queries.name: deleteFederatedUserCredentialsByRealm
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.realmId=:realmId

queries.name: deleteFederatedUserCredentialsByRealmAndLink
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.userId IN (select u.id from UserEntity u where u.realmId=:realmId and u.federationLink=:link)

queries.name: deleteFederatedUserCredentialsByStorageProvider
queries.jpql: delete from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.storageProviderId=:storageProviderId

queries.name: federatedUserCredentialByNameAndType
queries.jpql: select cred from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.userId = :userId and cred.type = :type and cred.userLabel = :userLabel order by cred.priority

queries.name: federatedUserCredentialByUser
queries.jpql: select cred from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.userId = :userId order by cred.priority

queries.name: federatedUserCredentialByUserAndType
queries.jpql: select cred from FederatedUserCredentialEntity cred where cred.userId = :userId and cred.type = :type order by cred.priority

queries.name: deleteUserAttributesByNameAndUser
queries.jpql: delete from UserAttributeEntity attr where attr.user.id = :userId and attr.name = :name

queries.name: deleteUserAttributesByNameAndUserOtherThan
queries.jpql: delete from UserAttributeEntity attr where attr.user.id = :userId and attr.name = :name and attr.id <> :attrId

queries.name: deleteUserAttributesByRealm
queries.jpql: delete from UserAttributeEntity attr where attr.user IN (select u from UserEntity u where u.realmId=:realmId)

queries.name: deleteUserAttributesByRealmAndLink
queries.jpql: delete from UserAttributeEntity attr where attr.user IN (select u from UserEntity u where u.realmId=:realmId and u.federationLink=:link)

queries.name: deleteUsersByRealm
queries.jpql: delete from UserEntity u where u.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: deleteUsersByRealmAndLink
queries.jpql: delete from UserEntity u where u.realmId = :realmId and u.federationLink=:link

queries.name: getRealmUserByEmail
queries.jpql: select u from UserEntity u where u.email = :email and u.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: getRealmUserByFirstLastName
queries.jpql: select u from UserEntity u where u.firstName = :first and u.lastName = :last and u.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: getRealmUserByLastName
queries.jpql: select u from UserEntity u where u.lastName = :lastName and u.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: getRealmUserByServiceAccount
queries.jpql: select u from UserEntity u where u.serviceAccountClientLink = :clientInternalId and u.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: getRealmUserByUsername
queries.jpql: select u from UserEntity u where u.username = :username and u.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: getRealmUserCount
queries.jpql: select count(u) from UserEntity u where u.realmId = :realmId

queries.name: getRealmUserCountExcludeServiceAccount
queries.jpql: select count(u) from UserEntity u where u.realmId = :realmId and (u.serviceAccountClientLink is null)

queries.name: getRealmUsersByAttributeNameAndLongValue
queries.jpql: select u from UserEntity u join u.attributes attr where u.realmId = :realmId and attr.name = :name and attr.longValueHash = :longValueHash

queries.name: getRealmUsersByAttributeNameAndValue
queries.jpql: select u from UserEntity u join u.attributes attr where u.realmId = :realmId and attr.name = :name and attr.value = :value

queries.name: unlinkUsers
queries.jpql: update UserEntity u set u.federationLink = null where u.realmId = :realmId and u.federationLink=:link
